questionHtml:
Which cell is a component of the innate immune system?


A.  T lymphocyte

B.  Phagocyte

C.  B lymphocyte

D.  B memory cell

meta.title: Which cell is a component of the innate immune system? A. T lymphocyte B. Phagocyte C. B lymphocyte D. B memory cell
